response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with deep expertise in TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and software craftsmanship. However, while he has recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, he falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of dedicated AI solution development and lacks professional experience with Python, RAG architectures, and vector databases.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD.
Deep expertise in TypeScript and Node.js, as well as cloud infrastructure tools like AWS CDK and Kubernetes.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of experience specifically building and shipping AI-driven solutions.
No professional experience listed with Python, a primary language required for the role.
Missing explicit experience with vector databases and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) architectures.
